task_completion.description: The ASVS document is active and visible in the ReqView application.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the ReqView application open with the 'ASVS' document selected and displayed in the main view.

task_completion.description: Item 900 ('create a new empty document') is deleted.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent locating item ASVS-900 (or text 'create a new empty document') and deleting it (e.g., via context menu, keyboard shortcut, or the item disappearing from the document).

task_completion.description: Item 901 ('export requirements to CSV') is deleted.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent locating item ASVS-901 (or text 'export requirements to CSV') and deleting it.

task_completion.description: Item 902 ('move selected requirements or document sections') is deleted.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent locating item ASVS-902 (or text 'move selected requirements or document sections') and deleting it.

task_completion.description: Item 903 ('print the displayed requirements table') is deleted.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent locating item ASVS-903 (or text 'print the displayed requirements table') and deleting it.

task_completion.description: Legitimate ASVS security requirements are preserved.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show that standard ASVS security requirements remain in the document and were not deleted during the cleanup process.

integrity.description: The agent used the ReqView GUI to perform the deletions.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the ReqView application interface (menus, right-clicks, etc.) rather than terminal commands or text editors modifying JSON files directly.

integrity.description: The agent selectively deleted the contaminating items without mass deletion.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent targets specific items for deletion rather than selecting all items or deleting entire folders/sections indiscriminately.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual ReqView application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The ReqView application window is visible and used throughout the task, not a mock interface or a different text editor.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target document is 'ASVS'. Exactly 4 contaminating items were injected and must be deleted. Their ASVS IDs and text snippets are: ID 900 ('create a new empty document'), ID 901 ('export requirements to CSV'), ID 902 ('move selected requirements or document sections'), and ID 903 ('print the displayed requirements table'). Prior to injection, the ASVS document contained exactly 405 legitimate security requirement items, which must be preserved.
